top_stories.title: TigerConnect Launches AI-Powered Operator Console to Modernize Hospital Comms
top_stories.description: Cloud-Native Smart Switchboard Replaces Legacy Operator Consoles TigerConnect, the leader in healthcare communication orchestration, today announced the launch of the TigerConnect Operator Console, a cloud-native, AI-powered hospital communication platform that modernizes how hospitals manage calls, critical events, and operator-driven workflows. Designed to replace legacy, on-premise systems and built for Cisco Webex... The post TigerConnect Launches AI-Powered Operator Console to Modernize...

top_stories.title: Sakana AI Introduces Doc-to-LoRA and Text-to-LoRA: Hypernetworks that Instantly Internalize Long Contexts and Adapt LLMs via Zero-Shot Natural Language
top_stories.description: Customizing Large Language Models (LLMs) currently presents a significant engineering trade-off between the flexibility of In-Context Learning (ICL) and the efficiency of Context Distillation (CD) or Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT). Tokyo-based Sakana AI has proposed a new approach to bypass these constraints through cost amortization. In two of their recent papers, they introduced Text-to-LoRA (T2L) and […] The post Sakana AI Introduces Doc-to-LoRA and Text-to-LoRA: Hypernetworks that Instantly...
top_stories.author: Asif Razzaq
top_stories.content: Customizing Large Language Models (LLMs) currently presents a significant engineering trade-off between the flexibility of In-Context Learning (ICL) and the efficiency of Context Distillation (CD) or Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT). Tokyo-based Sakana AI has proposed a new approach to bypass these constraints through cost amortization. top_stories.title: Now Live: The World’s Most Powerful AI Factory for Pharmaceutical Discovery and Development
top_stories.description: Lilly this week launched the most powerful AI factory wholly owned and operated by a pharmaceutical company to help its teams make meaningful medical advancements faster, more accurately and at unprecedented scale. Dubbed LillyPod, it’s the world’s first NVIDIA DGX SuperPOD with DGX B300 systems.
top_stories.author: Rory Kelleher
top_stories.content: Lilly this week launched the most powerful AI factory wholly owned and operated by a pharmaceutical company to help its teams make meaningful medical advancements faster, more accurately and at unprecedented scale. Dubbed LillyPod, it’s the world’s first NVIDIA DGX SuperPOD with DGX B300 systems.

top_stories.title: Cognitive speed training over weeks may delay the diagnosis of dementia over decades
top_stories.description: NIH-funded effort finds positive outcomes with strategies that engaged mostly unconscious, rather than conscious, thinking.
top_stories.content: NIH-funded effort finds positive outcomes with strategies that engaged mostly unconscious, rather than conscious, thinking.
